prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-ZOMBIENARUTOTHROWINGKNIVES-3PC Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Biohazard 3pc Outdoor Camping Practice Throwing Knives Set With Paracord Handle With Sheath, 7", Black Description: Practice and perfect your your skills with the 3pc Outdoor Camping Throwing Knives. With these throwing knives, you can enjoy learning the skill and technique of knife throwing.

Carefully balanced with the center of gravity in the middle of the knives, these blades will make even, round circles in flight. The single-edged green cord-wrapped blades will give you the option to grip them from either the handle or the blade side, and allow for more variation in throwing techniques.

Included is a reinforced nylon sheath that will hold all three knives. Each knife is measured about 7 inches long and has its own compartment, so you'll be able to keep them separate to resist dulling and help maintain the black finish.

Throwing knives can be a fun skill to learn. Impress friends and family with pin point accuracy and throwing technique. Search Terms: throwing knives carrying case black martial arts stars Features: - Biohazard Brand 3pc Zombie Throwing Knives - Material: 440 Stainless Steel - Each Throwing Knife is about 7 Inches in Length - Black Nylon Sheath Included - Sleek and Lightweight === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Balanced Flight, Paracord Handle, Nylon Sheath, Practice Skill Set

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Balanced Center Of Gravity, Paracord Wrapped Grip, Nylon Sheath Included, Sleek And Lightweight
